description: CHATDIRECTOR and orchestration core for routing AiAuthoringRequests into the correct constellation repos based on the routing spine.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Orchestrator must not store narrative content; only envelopes, plans, and audit artifacts.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All authoring and routing artifacts must include schemaRef pointing to tooling schemas.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: AiAuthoringRequest and AiAuthoringPlan must always declare objectKind, tier, targetRepo, targetPath, and schemaRef for each step.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: CHATDIRECTOR must resolve all routes using the routing spine before dispatching to any repo.

authoringHints.summary: Central planner for all AI-authored flows. No contracts live here; only requests, plans, profiles, and audit logs.
aiBehavior: Always call resolve_route(objectKind, tier) against the routing spine before selecting targetRepo.
Store only AiAuthoringRequest, AiAuthoringPlan, and audit envelopes here, never concrete region/seed/event contracts.
Use this repo as the coordination surface for multi-repo authoring sessions.
